Map of CVE to Solaris Third Party Bulletin

Map of CVE to Solaris Third Party Bulletin


The following table maps CVEs to the Solaris Third Party Bulletins that address them. Please note that some CVE IDs may appear more than once as patches for different Solaris components may be delivered in different distributions.

Oracle recommends that customers always apply the latest Solaris Third Party Bulletin patches for protection against known vulnerabilities.

Vulnerability Identifier Solaris Component Advisory
